title: UXLink - Rekt
relevance_summary: Admin privileges exploited via delegateCall to change ownership and withdraw funds across multiple blockchains

prevention.rule: Block any tx that uses delegateCall to modify admin roles within the same transaction

red_flags: delegateCall used to modify admin roles
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that uses delegateCall to modify admin roles within the same transaction
summary: UXLink's treasury was exploited via admin privileges, using delegateCall to change ownership and withdraw millions across multiple blockchains. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions by monitoring for delegateCall usage to modify admin roles.
